title: Repealed
doc_html:
§3690.1. Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 648, §3, eff. July 1, 2015.

            Acts 1998, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 97, §1, eff. May 5, 1998; Acts 2014, No. 648, §3, eff. July 1, 2015.
